props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Duct Cleaning and Sealing in {city}

faqs.question: How often should air ducts be cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend professional duct cleaning every 3-5 years, or sooner if you notice excessive dust, musty odors, visible mold, or if you've recently completed home renovations. Homes with pets or allergy sufferers may benefit from more frequent cleaning.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of duct sealing?
faqs.answer: Duct sealing prevents conditioned air from escaping through leaks and gaps, improving energy efficiency by up to 20-30%. It also reduces dust, improves comfort in hard-to-heat or cool rooms, and helps maintain better indoor air quality.

faqs.question: How long does duct cleaning and sealing take?
faqs.answer: A typical duct cleaning takes 3-5 hours depending on the size of your home and ductwork system. Duct sealing can add an additional 1-2 hours. We'll provide a time estimate based on your specific setup.
